summary: [critical] WIN-014 / SEC-6.14 Tomás & Mendoza-Torres 2018 attribution wrong; URL https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0273117718300656 actually resolves to Kim, J. H. & Chang, H. Y. (2018), Adv. Space Res. 61(8) 2040–2049 (NASA ADS bibcode 2018AdSpR..61.2040K). Same paper described by description (39 eclipses, 207 measurements, 1991–2016). Attribution corrected, URL preserved. Fixed in WIN-014 (PATCH-358-B) and SEC-6.14 (PATCH-358-D). EXP-358 review_class: verification — batchable per PROP-025. All replacement citations were independently verified via web search + direct page fetch; no verdict logic changes.
